questionHtml: Suggest one difference between tissue taken from a lung cancer tumour and normal lung tissue that might be seen in micrographs.
markschemeHtml:
1. fewer/smaller/lack of alveoli/air spaces;
  2. many cells/nuclei per area / much denser tissue;
  3. more cells undergoing mitosis (in the tumour);

meta.title: Suggest one difference between tissue taken from a lung cancer tumour and normal lung tissue that might be seen in micrographs.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.17. Differences between tumours in rates of cell division and growth and in the capacity for metastasis and invasion of neighbouring tissue
